---
title: "Congo Malaria Rev1: DRC Infant Gut Microbiome and Malaria Susceptibility"
author: "Christopher L. Dutton, Madison Follis, Jenny Munaweera, Felicien Masanga Maisha, Connie J. Mulligan, and Julie M. Moore"
date: "Last compiled on `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: false
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7, dpi = 150,
  out.width = "100%",
  cache = FALSE
)
# NOTE: Global cache=TRUE was disabled because this Rmd loads many packages
# (dar, randomForest, etc.) that mask phyloseq/ggplot2 functions. Cached
# chunks don't re-execute library() calls, so masking can silently break
# across cached vs fresh runs. Slow chunks (classifiers, permutations)
# retain cache=TRUE individually via their chunk headers.
```

# Setup

## Load all packages

```{r load-packages, cache=FALSE}
library(plyr)       # MUST load before dplyr
library(phyloseq)
library(microeco)
library(file2meco)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)      # loaded after plyr to take precedence
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(microbiome)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(reshape2)
library(splinectomeR)
library(vegan)
library(caret)
library(Boruta)
library(randomForest)
library(pwr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

## Load data (once)

All analyses start from `psCombinedCongo_V5.rds`. We load it once here.

```{r load-data, cache=FALSE}
set.seed(11)

combinedcongo <- readRDS("psCombinedCongo_V5.rds")
cat(sprintf("Loaded phyloseq object: %d taxa x %d samples\n",
            phyloseq::ntaxa(combinedcongo), phyloseq::nsamples(combinedcongo)))

# Also load malaria risk scores
risk_df <- read.csv("working_malaria_risk_score.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

## Define global colors and helper functions

```{r helpers, cache=FALSE}
# Output directory for saved figures
dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Helper to save a ggplot to both PNG and PDF
save_fig <- function(plot, name, width = 10, height = 7) {
  ggsave(file.path("figures", paste0(name, ".png")), plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path("figures", paste0(name, ".pdf")), plot, width = width, height = height)
  cat(sprintf("Saved: figures/%s.png and .pdf\n", name))
}

# Standard colors used throughout
JulieRed    <- "#FF0000"
JulieBlue   <- "#0000FF"
color_vals  <- c(Never = JulieBlue, Yes = JulieRed)
timecolors  <- c("6W" = "#F605FA", "3M" = "#05FAF6", "6M" = "#FF0000", "1Y" = "#0000FF")

# Standard microeco cleanup function (used by nearly every analysis)
make_clean_meco <- function(ps = combinedcongo) {
  dataset <- phyloseq2meco(ps)
  dataset$tidy_dataset()
  dataset$tax_table %<>% base::subset(Kingdom %in% c("k__Archaea", "k__Bacteria"))
  dataset$filter_pollution(taxa = c("mitochondria", "chloroplast"))
  dataset$tidy_dataset()
  return(dataset)
}

# Prepare a timepoint-specific dataset for malaria comparisons
make_timepoint_meco <- function(time_point, ps = combinedcongo, 
                                 group_col = "BeforeMalaria") {
  dataset <- make_clean_meco(ps)
  dataset$sample_table <- subset(dataset$sample_table, 
                                  Time == time_point & Type == "sample")
  if (group_col == "BeforeMalaria") {
    dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria[is.na(dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
    dataset$sample_table <- subset(dataset$sample_table, 
                                    BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))
  }
  dataset$tidy_dataset()
  return(dataset)
}

# Flip, split, merge for SplinectomeR
flip_split_merge <- function(otus_in, metadata) {
  row.names(otus_in) <- otus_in$Taxa
  otus_in$Taxa <- NULL
  otus_in <- data.frame(t(otus_in))
  otus_in <- tibble::rownames_to_column(otus_in, var = "sampleID")
  otus_meta <- merge(metadata, otus_in, by = "sampleID")
  return(otus_meta)
}

# Samples to remove (replicates/mocks) for SplinectomeR analyses
samples_to_remove <- c(
  "G7_3MR", "G46_3MR", "G4_3MR", "G20_PT2R", "G19_6WR",
  "G45_1Y_2", "G23_PT1B", "G7_PT1", "G20_PT2", "G20_MV1",
  "G20_PT1", "G2_PT", "G19_MV3", "G17_3M", "G12_PT1", "G7_MV2"
)
```

# Figure 2: Longitudinal Microbiome Development

## Figure 2A: Top 10 species over time (SplinectomeR)

```{r fig2a, fig.width=12, fig.height=7, fig.cap="Longitudinal SplinectomeR analysis of top 10 species."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_2A.R
# Key: filter Type == "sample" in phyloseq BEFORE converting to microeco
set.seed(11)

samples_2a <- phyloseq::subset_samples(combinedcongo, Type == "sample")
dataset_2a <- phyloseq2meco(samples_2a)
dataset_2a$tidy_dataset()
dataset_2a$tax_table %<>% base::subset(Kingdom == "k__Archaea" | Kingdom == "k__Bacteria")
dataset_2a$filter_pollution(taxa = c("mitochondria", "chloroplast"))
dataset_2a$tidy_dataset()
dataset_2a$cal_abund()

otus <- dataset_2a$taxa_abund$Species
taxa_sums <- rowSums(otus)
top_10_names <- names(sort(taxa_sums, decreasing = TRUE))[1:10]
otus_top10_t <- as.data.frame(t(otus[top_10_names, ]))
otus_top10_t <- tibble::rownames_to_column(otus_top10_t, var = "sampleID")

metadata_2a <- dataset_2a$sample_table
colnames(metadata_2a)[colnames(metadata_2a) == "CalculatedWeeks"] <- "timepoint"
colnames(metadata_2a)[colnames(metadata_2a) == "sampleId"] <- "sampleID"
metadata_2a$sampleID <- gsub("-", "_", metadata_2a$sampleID)

plot_data <- merge(metadata_2a, otus_top10_t, by = "sampleID")
taxa_cols <- colnames(otus_top10_t)[-1]

plot_df_long <- plot_data %>%
  gather(key = "species", value = "relative_abundance", all_of(taxa_cols)) %>%
  separate(col = species, sep = "g__", into = c("uplevel", "clean_species"),
           remove = FALSE, extra = "merge") %>%
  mutate(species_label = ifelse(is.na(clean_species), species, clean_species))

# Clean species names — using bare gsub (regex mode) as in original .R file
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Bifidobacterium.s__longum", "Bifidobacterium longum", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Escherichia.s__coli", "Escherichia coli", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Streptococcus.s__salivarius", "Streptococcus salivarius", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Bacteroides.s__fragilis", "Bacteroides fragilis", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Bifidobacterium.s__breve", "Bifidobacterium breve", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Veillonella.s__ratti", "Veillonella ratti", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Prevotella_9.s__", "Prevotella 9", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Bacteroides.s__vulgatus", "Bacteroides vulgatus", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Faecalibacterium.s__prausnitzii", "Faecalibacterium prausnitzii", plot_df_long$species_label)
plot_df_long$species_label <- gsub("Blautia.s__", "Blautia ", plot_df_long$species_label)

plot_df_long$timepoint <- as.numeric(plot_df_long$timepoint)
plot_df_long$relative_abundance <- as.numeric(plot_df_long$relative_abundance)

p2a <- ggplot(plot_df_long, aes(color = species_label, x = timepoint, y = relative_abundance)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Weeks", y = "Relative Abundance (%)", color = "Top 10 Genus Species") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p2a)
save_fig(p2a, "Fig2A_top10_species", width = 12, height = 7)
```

## Figure 2B: PCoA by timepoint

```{r fig2b, fig.cap="PCoA of Bray-Curtis distance by timepoint."}
set.seed(11)
dataset_2b <- make_clean_meco()
dataset_2b$sample_table <- subset(dataset_2b$sample_table, Time %in% c("6W", "3M", "6M", "1Y"))
dataset_2b$tidy_dataset()
dataset_2b$sample_table$Time %<>% factor(., levels = c("6W", "3M", "6M", "1Y"))
dataset_2b$cal_betadiv(unifrac = FALSE)

t1 <- trans_beta$new(dataset = dataset_2b, group = "Time", measure = "bray")
t1$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
p2b <- t1$plot_ordination(plot_color = "Time", plot_shape = "Time",
                   plot_type = c("point", "ellipse"), color_values = timecolors) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p2b)
save_fig(p2b, "Fig2B_PCoA_timepoint", width = 10, height = 7)
```

## Figures 2C-E: PCoA by malaria status at each timepoint

```{r fig2cde, fig.width=18, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PCoA by malaria status at 6W, 3M, and 6M."}
set.seed(11)
pcoa_by_malaria <- function(time_point) {
  ds <- make_timepoint_meco(time_point)
  ds$cal_betadiv(unifrac = FALSE)
  t1 <- trans_beta$new(dataset = ds, group = "BeforeMalaria", measure = "bray")
  t1$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
  t1$plot_ordination(plot_color = "BeforeMalaria", plot_shape = "BeforeMalaria",
                     plot_type = c("point", "ellipse"), color_values = color_vals) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) + ggtitle(time_point)
}

p2c <- pcoa_by_malaria("6W")
p2d <- pcoa_by_malaria("3M")
p2e <- pcoa_by_malaria("6M")
p2cde <- plot_grid(p2c, p2d, p2e, ncol = 3)
print(p2cde)
save_fig(p2cde, "Fig2CDE_PCoA_malaria", width = 18, height = 6)
```


# Figure 3: Differential Abundance (LEfSe & SplinectomeR)

## Figures 3A-F: LEfSe analysis

```{r fig3af, fig.width=20, fig.height=12, fig.cap="LEfSe analysis at 6W, 3M, and 6M."}
set.seed(11)
get_lefse_plots <- function(time_point, taxa_indices) {
  dataset <- make_clean_meco()
  dataset$sample_table <- subset(dataset$sample_table, 
                                  Time == time_point & Type == "sample")
  dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria[is.na(dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
  dataset$sample_table <- subset(dataset$sample_table, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))
  dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria <- gsub("Yes", "Susceptible", dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria)
  dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria <- gsub("Never", "Resistant", dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria)
  dataset$tidy_dataset()
  dataset$cal_abund()
  
  t1 <- trans_diff$new(dataset = dataset, method = "lefse", group = "BeforeMalaria",
                        alpha = 0.05, p_adjust_method = "none")
  # NOTE: LEfSe is run without FDR correction (its default). When FDR
  # correction was applied, no taxa reached significance at any timepoint,
  # indicating that the LEfSe results should be interpreted as exploratory.
  # The key taxa identified here are independently confirmed by ANCOM-BC
  # (Holm-corrected) and DAR multi-method consensus analysis.
  
  plot_bar <- t1$plot_diff_bar(use_number = taxa_indices, width = 0.8,
                                color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
  plot_abund <- t1$plot_diff_abund(use_number = taxa_indices,
                                    color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed),
                                    add_sig = FALSE) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
  return(list(bar = plot_bar, abund = plot_abund))
}

plots_6w <- get_lefse_plots("6W", 1:13)
plots_3m <- get_lefse_plots("3M", 1:6)
plots_6m <- get_lefse_plots("6M", 1:6)

legend_b <- get_legend(plots_6w$bar)

col1 <- plot_grid(ggdraw() + draw_label("A: 6 Weeks", size = 20),
                  plots_6w$bar + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  plots_6w$abund + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1, 1))
col2 <- plot_grid(ggdraw() + draw_label("B: 3 Months", size = 20),
                  plots_3m$bar + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  plots_3m$abund + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1, 1))
col3 <- plot_grid(ggdraw() + draw_label("C: 6 Months", size = 20),
                  plots_6m$bar + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  plots_6m$abund + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1, 1))

combined_lefse <- plot_grid(col1, col2, col3, legend_b, ncol = 4, rel_widths = c(1, 1, 1, 0.5))
print(combined_lefse)
save_fig(combined_lefse, "Fig3_LEfSe_combined", width = 20, height = 12)
```

**Note on LEfSe p-value correction:** LEfSe was run using its default (no FDR correction). When FDR correction was applied as a sensitivity check, no taxa reached significance at any timepoint, indicating that the LEfSe-specific results are exploratory. Importantly, the key taxa identified by LEfSe — including *Bifidobacterium*, *Streptococcus*, *Klebsiella*, *Megasphaera*, and *Lactobacillaceae* — are independently confirmed as differentially abundant by ANCOM-BC (Holm-corrected, controlling for sex and antibiotics) and by DAR multi-method consensus (significance by ≥2 methods). The LEfSe results are therefore presented as corroborative rather than standalone evidence.

## Figures 3G-H: SplinectomeR longitudinal analysis

The custom `permuspliner_full` function is defined here and used for both
*S. salivarius* (3G) and *K. pneumoniae* (3H).

```{r permuspliner-function}
# Custom permuspliner function — verbatim from Figure_3G.R / Figure_3H.R
permuspliner_full <- function(data = NULL, xvar = NULL, yvar = NULL, category = NULL,
                              cases = NULL, groups = NA, perms = 999, retain_perm = TRUE,
                              test_direction = 'more', cut_low = NA,
                              ints = 1000, quiet = FALSE, cut_sparse = 4, ...) {
  
  suppargs <- list(...)
  if ("set_spar" %in% names(suppargs)) {
    set_spar = as.numeric(suppargs$set_spar)
  } else {set_spar <- NULL}
  
  if ("set_tol" %in% names(suppargs)) {
    set_tol = as.numeric(suppargs$set_tol)
  } else {set_tol <- 1e-4}
  
  if ("pmethod" %in% names(suppargs)) {
    pmethod = as.character(suppargs$pmethod)
  } else {pmethod <- 'loess'}
  
  if (missing(data) | missing(category) | missing(xvar) | missing(yvar) | missing(cases)) {
    stop('Missing required parameter(s).')
  }
  
  perms = as.numeric(perms)
  ints = as.numeric(ints)
  cases = as.character(cases)
  groups = as.character(groups)
  
  in_df <- data
  if (is.na(groups[1])) {
    v1 <- as.character(unique(in_df[, category])[1])
    v2 <- as.character(unique(in_df[, category])[2])
  } else {
    v1 <- as.character(groups[1])
    v2 <- as.character(groups[2])
  }
  
  if (!is.na(cut_low)) {
    cut_low <- as.numeric(cut_low)
    keep_ids <- data.frame(table(in_df[, cases]))
    keep_ids <- as.character(keep_ids[keep_ids$Freq > cut_low, ]$Var1)
    in_df <- in_df[in_df[, cases] %in% keep_ids, ]
  }
  
  df_v1 <- in_df[in_df[, category] %in% c(v1) & !is.na(in_df[, xvar]), ]
  df_v2 <- in_df[in_df[, category] %in% c(v2) & !is.na(in_df[, xvar]), ]
  
  if (length(df_v1[, xvar]) < cut_sparse | length(df_v2[, xvar]) < cut_sparse) {
    stop('Not enough data in each group to fit spline')
  }
  
  if (pmethod=='cubic') {
    df_v1_spl <- with(df_v1, smooth.spline(x=df_v1[, xvar], y=df_v1[, yvar], spar = set_spar, tol = set_tol))
    df_v2_spl <- with(df_v2, smooth.spline(x=df_v2[, xvar], y=df_v2[, yvar], spar = set_spar, tol = set_tol))
  } else if (pmethod == 'loess') {
    testform <- reformulate(termlabels = xvar, response = yvar)
    if (is.null(set_spar)) {
      df_v1_spl <- with(df_v1, loess(testform, data=df_v1))
      df_v2_spl <- with(df_v2, loess(testform, data=df_v2))
    } else {
      df_v1_spl <- with(df_v1, loess(testform, data=df_v1, span = set_spar))
      df_v2_spl <- with(df_v2, loess(testform, data=df_v2, span = set_spar))
    }
  }
  
  x0 <- max(c(min(df_v1_spl$x)), min(df_v2_spl$x))
  x1 <- min(c(max(df_v1_spl$x)), max(df_v2_spl$x))
  xby <- (x1 - x0) / (ints - 1)
  xx <- seq(x0, x1, by = xby)
  
  v1_spl_f <- data.frame(predict(df_v1_spl, xx))
  if (ncol(v1_spl_f)==1) v1_spl_f <- cbind(xx,v1_spl_f)
  colnames(v1_spl_f) <- c('x', 'var1')
  v2_spl_f <- data.frame(predict(df_v2_spl, xx))
  if (ncol(v2_spl_f)==1) v2_spl_f <- cbind(xx,v2_spl_f)
  colnames(v2_spl_f) <- c('x', 'var2')
  
  real_spl_dist <- merge(v1_spl_f, v2_spl_f, by = 'x')
  real_spl_dist$abs.distance <- abs(real_spl_dist$var1 - real_spl_dist$var2)
  real_area <- sum(real_spl_dist$abs.distance) / ints
  
  case_shuff <- 'case_shuff'
  
  .spline_permute <- function(randy) {
    randy_meta <- randy[!duplicated(randy[, cases]), ]
    randy_meta$case_shuff <- sample(randy_meta[, category])
    randy_meta <- randy_meta[, c(cases, case_shuff)]
    randy <- merge(randy, randy_meta, by = cases, all = T)
    randy_v1 <- randy[randy[, case_shuff] %in% c(v1) & !is.na(randy[, xvar]), ]
    randy_v2 <- randy[randy[, case_shuff] %in% c(v2) & !is.na(randy[, xvar]), ]
    
    if (pmethod == 'cubic') {
      randy_v1_spl <- with(randy_v1, smooth.spline(x=randy_v1[, xvar], y=randy_v1[, yvar], spar = set_spar, tol = set_tol))
      randy_v2_spl <- with(randy_v2, smooth.spline(x=randy_v2[, xvar], y=randy_v2[, yvar], spar = set_spar, tol = set_tol))
    } else if (pmethod == 'loess') {
      if (is.null(set_spar)) {
        randy_v1_spl <- with(randy_v1, loess(testform, data=randy_v1))
        randy_v2_spl <- with(randy_v2, loess(testform, data=randy_v2))
      } else {
        randy_v1_spl <- with(randy_v1, loess(testform, data=randy_v1, span = set_spar))
        randy_v2_spl <- with(randy_v2, loess(testform, data=randy_v2, span = set_spar))
      }
    }
    
    randy_v1_fit <- data.frame(predict(randy_v1_spl, xx))
    if (ncol(randy_v1_fit)==1) randy_v1_fit <- cbind(xx,randy_v1_fit)
    colnames(randy_v1_fit) <- c('x', 'var1')
    randy_v2_fit <- data.frame(predict(randy_v2_spl, xx))
    if (ncol(randy_v2_fit)==1) randy_v2_fit <- cbind(xx,randy_v2_fit)
    colnames(randy_v2_fit) <- c('x', 'var2')
    
    spl_dist <- merge(randy_v1_fit, randy_v2_fit, by = 'x')
    spl_dist$abs_distance <- abs(spl_dist$var1 - spl_dist$var2)
    
    if (retain_perm == TRUE) {
      transfer_perms <- spl_dist[, 2:4]
      colnames(transfer_perms) <- c(paste0('v1perm_',ix), paste0('v2perm_',ix), paste0('pdistance_',ix))
      if (ix > 1) perm_retainer <- perm_output$perm_retainer
      perm_retainer <- cbind(perm_retainer, transfer_perms)
      perm_output$perm_retainer <- perm_retainer
      perm_area <- sum(spl_dist$abs_distance, na.rm = T) / sum(!is.na(spl_dist$abs_distance))
      if (ix > 1) permuted <- perm_output$permuted
      permuted <- append(permuted, perm_area)
      perm_output$permuted <- permuted
      return(perm_output)
    } else {
      perm_area <- sum(spl_dist$abs_distance, na.rm = T) / sum(!is.na(spl_dist$abs_distance))
      permuted <- append(permuted, perm_area)
      return(permuted)
    }
  }
  
  in_rand <- rbind(df_v1, df_v2)
  permuted <- list()
  if (retain_perm == TRUE) {
    perm_output <- list()
    perm_retainer <- data.frame(row.names = xx)
    for (ix in 1:perms) {
      perm_output <- .spline_permute(randy = in_rand)
    }
    if (test_direction == 'more') {
      pval <- (sum(perm_output$permuted >= as.numeric(real_area)) + 1) / (perms + 1)
    } else {
      pval <- (sum(perm_output$permuted <= as.numeric(real_area)) + 1) / (perms + 1)
    }
  } else {
    permuted <- replicate(perms, .spline_permute(randy = in_rand))
    if (test_direction == 'more') {
      pval <- (sum(permuted >= as.numeric(real_area)) + 1) / (perms + 1)
    } else {
      pval <- (sum(permuted <= as.numeric(real_area)) + 1) / (perms + 1)
    }
  }
  
  v1_data <- df_v1; v2_data <- df_v2
  v1_data[, category] <- droplevels(factor(v1_data[, category]))
  v2_data[, category] <- droplevels(factor(v2_data[, category]))
  
  if (retain_perm == TRUE) {
    result <- list("pval" = pval, "category_1" = v1, "category_2" = v2,
                   "v1_interpolated" = v1_spl_f, "v2_interpolated" = v2_spl_f,
                   "v1_spline" = df_v1_spl, "v2_spline" = df_v2_spl,
                   "permuted_splines" = perm_output$perm_retainer,
                   "true_distance" = real_spl_dist,
                   "v1_data" = v1_data, "v2_data" = v2_data)
  } else {
    result <- list("pval" = pval, "v1_interpolated" = v1_spl_f, "v2_interpolated" = v2_spl_f,
                   "v1_spline" = df_v1_spl, "v2_spline" = df_v2_spl,
                   "v1_data" = v1_data, "v2_data" = v2_data)
  }
  return(result)
}
```

```{r splinectomer-data-prep}
set.seed(11)
# Prepare shared data for SplinectomeR (Figures 3G, 3H)
ps_spline <- phyloseq::subset_samples(combinedcongo, 
                             Type == "sample" & !phyloseq::sample_names(combinedcongo) %in% samples_to_remove)
ds_spline <- make_clean_meco(ps_spline)
ds_spline$cal_abund()

species_abund <- ds_spline$taxa_abund$Species
species_abund$Taxa <- rownames(species_abund)

metadata_spline <- ds_spline$sample_table
colnames(metadata_spline)[colnames(metadata_spline) == "CalculatedWeeks"] <- "timepoint"
colnames(metadata_spline)[colnames(metadata_spline) == "sampleId"] <- "sampleID"
metadata_spline$sampleID <- gsub("-", "_", metadata_spline$sampleID)

species_meta <- flip_split_merge(species_abund, metadata_spline)
species_meta_long <- species_meta %>%
  gather(key = "species", value = "relative_abundance", contains("k__"))
species_meta_long$species <- gsub("|", ".", species_meta_long$species, fixed = TRUE)
```

```{r fig3g, fig.cap="S. salivarius longitudinal SplinectomeR (p = .307)."}
set.seed(11)
target_3g <- "k__Bacteria.p__Firmicutes.c__Bacilli.o__Lactobacillales.f__Streptococcaceae.g__Streptococcus.s__salivarius"
sal_data <- species_meta_long %>%
  filter(species == target_3g) %>% drop_na(Malaria)
sal_data$relative_abundance <- as.numeric(sal_data$relative_abundance)
sal_data$timepoint <- as.numeric(sal_data$timepoint)

sal_result <- permuspliner_full(data = sal_data, xvar = "timepoint",
                                 yvar = "relative_abundance", perms = 999,
                                 category = "Malaria", cases = "Individual",
                                 retain_perm = TRUE)
sal_plot <- permuspliner.plot.permsplines(data = sal_result, xvar = "Time",
                                           yvar = "Relative Abundance")
p3g <- sal_plot + labs(title = "S. salivarius") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(6, 54), breaks = c(6, 12, 24, 54),
                     labels = c("6 Weeks", "3 Months", "6 Months", "1 Year")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed), name = "Malaria Infection") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20), legend.position = "none")
print(p3g)
save_fig(p3g, "Fig3G_salivarius_spline", width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r fig3h, fig.cap="K. pneumoniae longitudinal SplinectomeR (p = .047)."}
set.seed(11)
target_3h <- "k__Bacteria.p__Proteobacteria.c__Gammaproteobacteria.o__Enterobacterales.f__Enterobacteriaceae.g__Klebsiella.s__pneumoniae"
pneu_data <- species_meta_long %>%
  filter(species == target_3h) %>% drop_na(Malaria)
pneu_data$relative_abundance <- as.numeric(pneu_data$relative_abundance)
pneu_data$timepoint <- as.numeric(pneu_data$timepoint)

pneu_result <- permuspliner_full(data = pneu_data, xvar = "timepoint",
                                  yvar = "relative_abundance", perms = 999,
                                  category = "Malaria", cases = "Individual",
                                  retain_perm = TRUE)
pneu_plot <- permuspliner.plot.permsplines(data = pneu_result, xvar = "Time",
                                            yvar = "Relative Abundance")
p3h <- pneu_plot + labs(title = "K. pneumoniae") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "italic")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(6, 54), breaks = c(6, 12, 24, 54),
                     labels = c("6 Weeks", "3 Months", "6 Months", "1 Year")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed), name = "Malaria Infection") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20), legend.position = "none")
print(p3h)
save_fig(p3h, "Fig3H_pneumoniae_spline", width = 10, height = 7)
```


# Figure 5: ANCOM-BC Differential Abundance (with Heatmaps)

ANCOM-BC analyses are run at each timepoint, controlling for infant sex
(`Baby.sex.x`) and antibiotic use (`Med_Antibiotic`).

```{r fig5a, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC: 6 Weeks."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_4A.R
set.seed(11)

pseq_t_5a <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
pseq_t_5a <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5a, Type == "sample")
sixw_data_5a <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5a, Time == "6W")
sixw_data_5a <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(sixw_data_5a, "Species")

meta_df_5a <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(sixw_data_5a), "data.frame")
meta_df_5a$BeforeMalaria[is.na(meta_df_5a$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
phyloseq::sample_data(sixw_data_5a) <- phyloseq::sample_data(meta_df_5a)
sixw_data_5a <- phyloseq::subset_samples(sixw_data_5a, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))

out_5a <- ancombc(data = sixw_data_5a, tax_level = "Species",
                   formula = "BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic",
                   p_adj_method = "holm", group = "BeforeMalaria", struc_zero = TRUE,
                   neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                   alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)

res_q_5a <- out_5a$res$q_val
target_col_5a <- colnames(res_q_5a)[grep("BeforeMalaria.*Yes", colnames(res_q_5a))][1]
if (is.na(target_col_5a)) target_col_5a <- "BeforeMalariaYes"
res_sorted_5a <- res_q_5a[order(res_q_5a[[target_col_5a]], na.last = NA), ]

if ("taxon" %in% colnames(res_sorted_5a)) { taxa_sig_5a <- res_sorted_5a$taxon } else { taxa_sig_5a <- rownames(res_sorted_5a) }
# Top 11 for 6W
taxa_sig_5a <- taxa_sig_5a[1:min(11, length(taxa_sig_5a))]
taxa_sig_5a <- unique(c(taxa_sig_5a, "haemolyticus", "magna"))

# Lookup table
look_data_5a <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5a, Time == "6W")
ps_species_5a <- phyloseq::tax_glom(look_data_5a, "Species")
lt_5a <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_species_5a))
lt_5a$GenusL <- substr(lt_5a$Genus, 1, 1)
lt_5a$SpeciesL <- paste(lt_5a$GenusL, lt_5a$Species, sep = ". ")

datasetsig_5a <- phyloseq2meco(sixw_data_5a)
datasetsig_5a$tidy_dataset()
t1_5a <- trans_abund$new(dataset = datasetsig_5a, taxrank = "Species", input_taxaname = taxa_sig_5a)
t1_5a$data_taxanames <- lt_5a$SpeciesL[match(t1_5a$data_taxanames, lt_5a$Species)]
t1_5a$data_abund$Taxonomy <- lt_5a$SpeciesL[match(t1_5a$data_abund$Taxonomy, lt_5a$Species)]

p5a <- t1_5a$plot_box(group = "BeforeMalaria") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Before Malaria")) +
  ggtitle("\nTaxa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = ggplot2::margin(50, 0, 20, 0))) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))
print(p5a)
save_fig(p5a, "Fig5A_ANCOMBC_6W", width = 10, height = 7)
```

### Sensitivity check: ANCOM-BC at 6W adjusted for bednet use

```{r ancombc-bednet-sensitivity}
# Re-run 6W ANCOM-BC with bednet added to the formula
set.seed(11)

pseq_t_bn <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
pseq_t_bn <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_bn, Type == "sample")
sixw_bn <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_bn, Time == "6W")
sixw_bn <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(sixw_bn, "Species")

meta_bn <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(sixw_bn), "data.frame")
meta_bn$BeforeMalaria[is.na(meta_bn$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
phyloseq::sample_data(sixw_bn) <- phyloseq::sample_data(meta_bn)
sixw_bn <- phyloseq::subset_samples(sixw_bn, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))

out_bn <- ancombc(data = sixw_bn, tax_level = "Species",
                   formula = "BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic + X27_Bednet.y",
                   p_adj_method = "holm", group = "BeforeMalaria", struc_zero = TRUE,
                   neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                   alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)

res_q_bn <- out_bn$res$q_val
target_col_bn <- colnames(res_q_bn)[grep("BeforeMalaria.*Yes", colnames(res_q_bn))][1]
if (is.na(target_col_bn)) target_col_bn <- "BeforeMalariaYes"
res_sorted_bn <- res_q_bn[order(res_q_bn[[target_col_bn]], na.last = NA), ]

# Show taxa that remain significant (q < 0.05) after bednet adjustment
sig_bn <- res_sorted_bn[res_sorted_bn[[target_col_bn]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_bn)) sig_taxa_bn <- sig_bn$taxon else sig_taxa_bn <- rownames(sig_bn)

cat("=== ANCOM-BC 6W: Bednet-adjusted significant taxa (q < 0.05) ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Original formula: BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic\n"))
cat(sprintf("Adjusted formula: BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic + X27_Bednet.y\n\n"))
cat(sprintf("%d taxa significant after bednet adjustment:\n", length(sig_taxa_bn)))
if (length(sig_taxa_bn) > 0) print(sig_bn[, c("taxon", target_col_bn)][1:min(20, nrow(sig_bn)), ])
```

```{r fig5b, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC: 3 Months."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_4B.R
set.seed(11)

pseq_t_5b <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
pseq_t_5b <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5b, Type == "sample")
threem_data_5b <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5b, Time == "3M")
threem_data_5b <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(threem_data_5b, "Species")

meta_df_5b <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(threem_data_5b), "data.frame")
meta_df_5b$BeforeMalaria[is.na(meta_df_5b$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
phyloseq::sample_data(threem_data_5b) <- phyloseq::sample_data(meta_df_5b)
threem_data_5b <- phyloseq::subset_samples(threem_data_5b, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))

out_5b <- ancombc(data = threem_data_5b, tax_level = "Species",
                   formula = "BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic",
                   p_adj_method = "holm", group = "BeforeMalaria", struc_zero = TRUE,
                   neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                   alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)

res_q_5b <- out_5b$res$q_val
target_col_5b <- colnames(res_q_5b)[grep("BeforeMalaria.*Yes", colnames(res_q_5b))][1]
if (is.na(target_col_5b)) target_col_5b <- "BeforeMalariaYes"
res_sorted_5b <- res_q_5b[order(res_q_5b[[target_col_5b]], na.last = NA), ]

# q < 0.05 for 3M (NOT top 11)
sig_rows_5b <- res_sorted_5b[res_sorted_5b[[target_col_5b]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_5b)) taxa_sig_5b <- sig_rows_5b$taxon else taxa_sig_5b <- rownames(sig_rows_5b)
taxa_sig_5b <- unlist(taxa_sig_5b)
taxa_sig_5b <- unique(c(taxa_sig_5b, "faecium", "haemolyticus"))

# Lookup table
look_data_5b <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5b, Time == "3M")
ps_species_5b <- phyloseq::tax_glom(look_data_5b, "Species")
lt_5b <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_species_5b))
lt_5b$GenusL <- substr(lt_5b$Genus, 1, 1)
lt_5b$SpeciesL <- paste(lt_5b$GenusL, lt_5b$Species, sep = ". ")

datasetsig_5b <- phyloseq2meco(threem_data_5b)
datasetsig_5b$tidy_dataset()
t1_5b <- trans_abund$new(dataset = datasetsig_5b, taxrank = "Species", input_taxaname = taxa_sig_5b)
t1_5b$data_taxanames <- lt_5b$SpeciesL[match(t1_5b$data_taxanames, lt_5b$Species)]
t1_5b$data_abund$Taxonomy <- lt_5b$SpeciesL[match(t1_5b$data_abund$Taxonomy, lt_5b$Species)]

p5b <- t1_5b$plot_box(group = "BeforeMalaria") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Before Malaria")) +
  ggtitle("\nTaxa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = ggplot2::margin(50, 0, 20, 0))) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold")) +
  theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 20, r = 20, b = 20, l = 20, unit = "pt"))
print(p5b)
save_fig(p5b, "Fig5B_ANCOMBC_3M", width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r fig5c, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC: 6 Months."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_4C.R
set.seed(11)

pseq_t_5c <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
pseq_t_5c <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5c, Type == "sample")
sixm_data_5c <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5c, Time == "6M")
sixm_data_5c <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(sixm_data_5c, "Species")

meta_df_5c <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(sixm_data_5c), "data.frame")
meta_df_5c$BeforeMalaria[is.na(meta_df_5c$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
phyloseq::sample_data(sixm_data_5c) <- phyloseq::sample_data(meta_df_5c)
sixm_data_5c <- phyloseq::subset_samples(sixm_data_5c, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))

out_5c <- ancombc(data = sixm_data_5c, tax_level = "Species",
                   formula = "BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic",
                   p_adj_method = "holm", group = "BeforeMalaria", struc_zero = TRUE,
                   neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                   alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)

res_q_5c <- out_5c$res$q_val
target_col_5c <- colnames(res_q_5c)[grep("BeforeMalaria.*Yes", colnames(res_q_5c))][1]
if (is.na(target_col_5c)) target_col_5c <- "BeforeMalariaYes"
res_sorted_5c <- res_q_5c[order(res_q_5c[[target_col_5c]], na.last = NA), ]

# q < 0.05 for 6M (NOT top 11)
sig_rows_5c <- res_sorted_5c[res_sorted_5c[[target_col_5c]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_5c)) taxa_sig_5c <- sig_rows_5c$taxon else taxa_sig_5c <- rownames(sig_rows_5c)
taxa_sig_5c <- unlist(taxa_sig_5c)
taxa_sig_5c <- unique(c(taxa_sig_5c, "faecis", "magna", "dispar"))

# Lookup table
look_data_5c <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5c, Time == "6M")
ps_species_5c <- phyloseq::tax_glom(look_data_5c, "Species")
lt_5c <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_species_5c))
lt_5c$GenusL <- substr(lt_5c$Genus, 1, 1)
lt_5c$SpeciesL <- paste(lt_5c$GenusL, lt_5c$Species, sep = ". ")

datasetsig_5c <- phyloseq2meco(sixm_data_5c)
datasetsig_5c$tidy_dataset()
t1_5c <- trans_abund$new(dataset = datasetsig_5c, taxrank = "Species", input_taxaname = taxa_sig_5c)
t1_5c$data_taxanames <- lt_5c$SpeciesL[match(t1_5c$data_taxanames, lt_5c$Species)]
t1_5c$data_abund$Taxonomy <- lt_5c$SpeciesL[match(t1_5c$data_abund$Taxonomy, lt_5c$Species)]

# Manual override: [. innocuum -> C. Innocuum
t1_5c$data_taxanames[t1_5c$data_taxanames == "[. innocuum"] <- "C. Innocuum"
t1_5c$data_abund$Taxonomy[t1_5c$data_abund$Taxonomy == "[. innocuum"] <- "C. Innocuum"

p5c <- t1_5c$plot_box(group = "BeforeMalaria") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Before Malaria")) +
  ggtitle("\nTaxa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = ggplot2::margin(50, 0, 20, 0))) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))
print(p5c)
save_fig(p5c, "Fig5C_ANCOMBC_6M", width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r fig5d, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC: 1 Year (grouped by malaria history)."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_4D.R
set.seed(11)

pseq_t_5d <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)
pseq_t_5d <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5d, Type == "sample")
oney_data_5d <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5d, Time == "1Y")
oney_data_5d <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(oney_data_5d, "Species")
oney_data_5d <- phyloseq::subset_samples(oney_data_5d, !is.na(Malaria))

out_5d <- ancombc(data = oney_data_5d, tax_level = "Species",
                   formula = "Malaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic",
                   p_adj_method = "holm", group = "Malaria", struc_zero = TRUE,
                   neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                   alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)

res_q_5d <- out_5d$res$q_val
target_col_5d <- colnames(res_q_5d)[grep("Malaria.*Yes", colnames(res_q_5d))][1]
if (is.na(target_col_5d)) target_col_5d <- "MalariaYes"
res_sorted_5d <- res_q_5d[order(res_q_5d[[target_col_5d]], na.last = NA), ]

# q < 0.05 for 1Y (NOT top 11)
sig_rows_5d <- res_sorted_5d[res_sorted_5d[[target_col_5d]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_5d)) taxa_sig_5d <- sig_rows_5d$taxon else taxa_sig_5d <- rownames(sig_rows_5d)
taxa_sig_5d <- unlist(taxa_sig_5d)
taxa_sig_5d <- unique(c(taxa_sig_5d, "finegoldii"))

# Lookup table
look_data_5d <- phyloseq::subset_samples(pseq_t_5d, Time == "1Y")
ps_species_5d <- phyloseq::tax_glom(look_data_5d, "Species")
lt_5d <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_species_5d))
lt_5d$GenusL <- substr(lt_5d$Genus, 1, 1)
lt_5d$SpeciesL <- paste(lt_5d$GenusL, lt_5d$Species, sep = ". ")

datasetsig_5d <- phyloseq2meco(oney_data_5d)
datasetsig_5d$tidy_dataset()
t1_5d <- trans_abund$new(dataset = datasetsig_5d, taxrank = "Species", input_taxaname = taxa_sig_5d)
t1_5d$data_taxanames <- lt_5d$SpeciesL[match(t1_5d$data_taxanames, lt_5d$Species)]
t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy <- lt_5d$SpeciesL[match(t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy, lt_5d$Species)]

# Manual overrides
t1_5d$data_taxanames[t1_5d$data_taxanames == "[. faecis"] <- "R. faecis"
t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy[t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy == "[. faecis"] <- "R. faecis"
t1_5d$data_taxanames[t1_5d$data_taxanames == "[. lactaris"] <- "R. lactaris"
t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy[t1_5d$data_abund$Taxonomy == "[. lactaris"] <- "R. lactaris"

p5d <- t1_5d$plot_box(group = "Malaria") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Malaria")) +
  ggtitle("\nTaxa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = ggplot2::margin(50, 0, 20, 0))) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))
print(p5d)
save_fig(p5d, "Fig5D_ANCOMBC_1Y", width = 10, height = 7)
```

## Figure S2: ANCOM-BC Heatmaps

Each heatmap is reproduced verbatim from its original `.R` file to preserve
per-timepoint taxa selection logic, manual name overrides, and Phylum row annotations.

```{r heatmap-helper}
# Shared helper for ANCOM-BC heatmap infrastructure
make_heatmap_base <- function(time_point, group_var = "BeforeMalaria",
                               formula_str = "BeforeMalaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic") {
  pseq_t <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(combinedcongo, function(x) x / sum(x) * 100)
  keep_smp <- phyloseq::sample_data(pseq_t)$Type == "sample"
  pseq_t <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep_smp, pseq_t)
  keep_tp <- phyloseq::sample_data(pseq_t)$Time == time_point
  tp_data <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep_tp, pseq_t)
  
  # Lookup table (before aggregation)
  ps_species <- phyloseq::tax_glom(tp_data, "Species")
  lt <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_species))
  lt$GenusL <- substr(lt$Genus, 1, 1)
  lt$SpeciesL <- paste(lt$GenusL, lt$Species, sep = ". ")
  
  tp_data <- microbiome::aggregate_taxa(tp_data, "Species")
  
  if (group_var == "BeforeMalaria") {
    meta_df <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(tp_data), "data.frame")
    meta_df$BeforeMalaria[is.na(meta_df$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
    phyloseq::sample_data(tp_data) <- phyloseq::sample_data(meta_df)
    keep_grp <- phyloseq::sample_data(tp_data)$BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never")
    tp_data <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep_grp, tp_data)
  } else {
    keep_grp <- !is.na(phyloseq::sample_data(tp_data)[[group_var]])
    tp_data <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep_grp, tp_data)
  }
  
  out <- ancombc(data = tp_data, tax_level = "Species", formula = formula_str,
                  p_adj_method = "holm", group = group_var, struc_zero = TRUE,
                  neg_lb = TRUE, pseudo = TRUE, prv_cut = 0.10, lib_cut = 0,
                  alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 1, verbose = FALSE)
  
  res_q <- out$res$q_val
  target_col_idx <- grep(paste0(group_var, ".*Yes"), colnames(res_q))
  if (length(target_col_idx) > 0) colnames(res_q)[target_col_idx] <- paste0(group_var, "Yes")
  target_col <- paste0(group_var, "Yes")
  res_q <- res_q[order(res_q[[target_col]], na.last = NA), ]
  
  list(tp_data = tp_data, res_q = res_q, target_col = target_col, lt = lt)
}
```

```{r figs2a, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC heatmap: 6 Weeks."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_S2_A.R
set.seed(11)
hm_6w <- make_heatmap_base("6W")

# Top 11 for 6W
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(hm_6w$res_q)) taxa_s2a <- hm_6w$res_q$taxon[1:11] else taxa_s2a <- rownames(hm_6w$res_q)[1:11]

ps_sig_s2a <- phyloseq::prune_taxa(taxa_s2a, hm_6w$tp_data)
mat_s2a <- as.matrix(data.frame(phyloseq::otu_table(ps_sig_s2a)))

metadata_s2a <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_sig_s2a))
ann_col_s2a <- data.frame(BeforeMalaria = as.factor(metadata_s2a$BeforeMalaria), check.names = FALSE)
rownames(ann_col_s2a) <- rownames(metadata_s2a)
ann_row_s2a <- data.frame(Phylum = as.factor(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_sig_s2a)[, "Phylum"]))
rownames(ann_row_s2a) <- rownames(mat_s2a)

phylum_col_s2a <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ann_row_s2a$Phylum)), "Paired")
names(phylum_col_s2a) <- levels(ann_row_s2a$Phylum)

# Manual fixes before lookup
rownames(mat_s2a)[grep("haemolyticus", rownames(mat_s2a))] <- "haemolyticus"
rownames(mat_s2a)[grep("magna", rownames(mat_s2a))] <- "magna"

for (col in 1:ncol(mat_s2a)) colnames(mat_s2a)[col] <- sub("_.*", "", colnames(mat_s2a)[col])
rownames(mat_s2a) <- hm_6w$lt$SpeciesL[match(rownames(mat_s2a), hm_6w$lt$Species)]

col_fun_s2a <- colorRamp2(c(min(mat_s2a), 1, max(mat_s2a)/2, max(mat_s2a)),
                            c("white", "#c994c7", "#e7298a", "#67001f"))

draw_hm_s2a <- function() {
  ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap(mat_s2a, name = "Relative\nAbundance\n(%)",
    annotation_col = ann_col_s2a, annotation_row = ann_row_s2a,
    annotation_colors = list(BeforeMalaria = c(Yes = "red", Never = "blue"), Phylum = phylum_col_s2a),
    col = col_fun_s2a,
    column_title = "A:  6 Weeks                                                                              \nIndividuals",
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20), row_title = "Taxa", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      at = c(min(mat_s2a), 1, max(mat_s2a)/2, max(mat_s2a)),
      labels = c(round(min(mat_s2a), 2), "1", round(max(mat_s2a)/2), round(max(mat_s2a)))))
}
draw(draw_hm_s2a())
pdf("figures/FigS2A_heatmap_6W.pdf", width = 14, height = 8); draw(draw_hm_s2a()); dev.off()
png("figures/FigS2A_heatmap_6W.png", width = 4200, height = 2400, res = 300); draw(draw_hm_s2a()); dev.off()
```

```{r figs2b, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC heatmap: 3 Months."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_S2_B.R
set.seed(11)
hm_3m <- make_heatmap_base("3M")

# q < 0.05 for 3M
sig_rows_s2b <- hm_3m$res_q[hm_3m$res_q[[hm_3m$target_col]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_s2b)) taxa_s2b <- sig_rows_s2b$taxon else taxa_s2b <- rownames(sig_rows_s2b)
taxa_s2b <- unlist(taxa_s2b)

ps_sig_s2b <- phyloseq::prune_taxa(taxa_s2b, hm_3m$tp_data)
mat_s2b <- as.matrix(data.frame(phyloseq::otu_table(ps_sig_s2b)))

metadata_s2b <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_sig_s2b))
ann_col_s2b <- data.frame(BeforeMalaria = as.factor(metadata_s2b$BeforeMalaria), check.names = FALSE)
rownames(ann_col_s2b) <- rownames(metadata_s2b)
ann_row_s2b <- data.frame(Phylum = as.factor(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_sig_s2b)[, "Phylum"]))
rownames(ann_row_s2b) <- rownames(mat_s2b)

phylum_col_s2b <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ann_row_s2b$Phylum)), "Paired")
names(phylum_col_s2b) <- levels(ann_row_s2b$Phylum)

# Name cleanup via lookup + manual overrides
new_names_s2b <- hm_3m$lt$SpeciesL[match(rownames(mat_s2b), hm_3m$lt$Species)]
final_names_s2b <- ifelse(is.na(new_names_s2b), rownames(mat_s2b), new_names_s2b)
final_names_s2b[grep("haemolyticus", final_names_s2b, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "S. haemolyticus"
final_names_s2b[grep("dispar", final_names_s2b, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "V. dispar"
final_names_s2b[grep("faecium", final_names_s2b, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "E. faecium"

for (col in 1:ncol(mat_s2b)) colnames(mat_s2b)[col] <- sub("_.*", "", colnames(mat_s2b)[col])
rownames(mat_s2b) <- final_names_s2b

col_fun_s2b <- colorRamp2(c(min(mat_s2b), 1, max(mat_s2b)/2, max(mat_s2b)),
                            c("white", "#c994c7", "#e7298a", "#67001f"))

draw_hm_s2b <- function() {
  ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap(mat_s2b, name = "Relative\nAbundance\n(%)",
    annotation_col = ann_col_s2b, annotation_row = ann_row_s2b,
    annotation_colors = list(BeforeMalaria = c(Yes = "red", Never = "blue"), Phylum = phylum_col_s2b),
    col = col_fun_s2b,
    column_title = "B:  3 Months                                                                              \nIndividuals",
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20), row_title = "Taxa", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      at = c(min(mat_s2b), 1, max(mat_s2b)/2, max(mat_s2b)),
      labels = c(round(min(mat_s2b), 2), "1", round(max(mat_s2b)/2), round(max(mat_s2b)))))
}
draw(draw_hm_s2b())
pdf("figures/FigS2B_heatmap_3M.pdf", width = 14, height = 8); draw(draw_hm_s2b()); dev.off()
png("figures/FigS2B_heatmap_3M.png", width = 4200, height = 2400, res = 300); draw(draw_hm_s2b()); dev.off()
```

```{r figs2c, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC heatmap: 6 Months."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_S2_C.R
set.seed(11)
hm_6m <- make_heatmap_base("6M")

# q < 0.05 for 6M
sig_rows_s2c <- hm_6m$res_q[hm_6m$res_q[[hm_6m$target_col]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_s2c)) taxa_s2c <- sig_rows_s2c$taxon else taxa_s2c <- rownames(sig_rows_s2c)
taxa_s2c <- unlist(taxa_s2c)

ps_sig_s2c <- phyloseq::prune_taxa(taxa_s2c, hm_6m$tp_data)
mat_s2c <- as.matrix(data.frame(phyloseq::otu_table(ps_sig_s2c)))

metadata_s2c <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_sig_s2c))
ann_col_s2c <- data.frame(BeforeMalaria = as.factor(metadata_s2c$BeforeMalaria), check.names = FALSE)
rownames(ann_col_s2c) <- rownames(metadata_s2c)
ann_row_s2c <- data.frame(Phylum = as.factor(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_sig_s2c)[, "Phylum"]))
rownames(ann_row_s2c) <- rownames(mat_s2c)

phylum_col_s2c <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ann_row_s2c$Phylum)), "Paired")
names(phylum_col_s2c) <- levels(ann_row_s2c$Phylum)

# Name cleanup via lookup + manual overrides (6M-specific)
new_names_s2c <- hm_6m$lt$SpeciesL[match(rownames(mat_s2c), hm_6m$lt$Species)]
final_names_s2c <- ifelse(is.na(new_names_s2c), rownames(mat_s2c), new_names_s2c)
final_names_s2c[final_names_s2c == "[. faecis"] <- "R. torques"
final_names_s2c[grep("faecis", final_names_s2c)] <- "R. torques"
final_names_s2c[final_names_s2c == "[. innocuum"] <- "C. innocuum"
final_names_s2c[grep("innocuum", final_names_s2c)] <- "C. innocuum"
final_names_s2c[grep("magna", final_names_s2c, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "F. magna"
final_names_s2c[grep("dispar", final_names_s2c, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "V. dispar"

for (col in 1:ncol(mat_s2c)) colnames(mat_s2c)[col] <- sub("_.*", "", colnames(mat_s2c)[col])
rownames(mat_s2c) <- final_names_s2c

col_fun_s2c <- colorRamp2(c(min(mat_s2c), 1, max(mat_s2c)/2, max(mat_s2c)),
                            c("white", "#c994c7", "#e7298a", "#67001f"))

draw_hm_s2c <- function() {
  ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap(mat_s2c, name = "Relative\nAbundance\n(%)",
    annotation_col = ann_col_s2c, annotation_row = ann_row_s2c,
    annotation_colors = list(BeforeMalaria = c(Yes = "red", Never = "blue"), Phylum = phylum_col_s2c),
    col = col_fun_s2c,
    column_title = "C:  6 Months                                                                              \nIndividuals",
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20), row_title = "Taxa", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      at = c(min(mat_s2c), 1, max(mat_s2c)/2, max(mat_s2c)),
      labels = c(round(min(mat_s2c), 2), "1", round(max(mat_s2c)/2), round(max(mat_s2c)))))
}
draw(draw_hm_s2c())
pdf("figures/FigS2C_heatmap_6M.pdf", width = 14, height = 8); draw(draw_hm_s2c()); dev.off()
png("figures/FigS2C_heatmap_6M.png", width = 4200, height = 2400, res = 300); draw(draw_hm_s2c()); dev.off()
```

```{r figs2d, fig.cap="ANCOM-BC heatmap: 1 Year."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_S2_D.R
set.seed(11)
hm_1y <- make_heatmap_base("1Y", group_var = "Malaria",
                             formula_str = "Malaria + Baby.sex.x + Med_Antibiotic")

# q < 0.05 for 1Y
sig_rows_s2d <- hm_1y$res_q[hm_1y$res_q[[hm_1y$target_col]] < 0.05, ]
if ("taxon" %in% colnames(sig_rows_s2d)) taxa_s2d <- sig_rows_s2d$taxon else taxa_s2d <- rownames(sig_rows_s2d)
taxa_s2d <- unlist(taxa_s2d)

ps_sig_s2d <- phyloseq::prune_taxa(taxa_s2d, hm_1y$tp_data)
mat_s2d <- as.matrix(data.frame(phyloseq::otu_table(ps_sig_s2d)))

metadata_s2d <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_sig_s2d))
ann_col_s2d <- data.frame(Malaria = as.factor(metadata_s2d$Malaria), check.names = FALSE)
rownames(ann_col_s2d) <- rownames(metadata_s2d)
ann_row_s2d <- data.frame(Phylum = as.factor(phyloseq::tax_table(ps_sig_s2d)[, "Phylum"]))
rownames(ann_row_s2d) <- rownames(mat_s2d)

phylum_col_s2d <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ann_row_s2d$Phylum)), "Paired")
names(phylum_col_s2d) <- levels(ann_row_s2d$Phylum)

# Name cleanup via lookup + manual overrides (1Y-specific)
new_names_s2d <- hm_1y$lt$SpeciesL[match(rownames(mat_s2d), hm_1y$lt$Species)]
final_names_s2d <- ifelse(is.na(new_names_s2d), rownames(mat_s2d), new_names_s2d)
final_names_s2d[grep("faecis", final_names_s2d)] <- "R. faecis"
final_names_s2d[final_names_s2d == "[. lactaris"] <- "R. lactaris"
final_names_s2d[grep("lactaris", final_names_s2d)] <- "R. lactaris"
final_names_s2d[grep("finegoldii", final_names_s2d, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "A. finegoldii"

for (col in 1:ncol(mat_s2d)) colnames(mat_s2d)[col] <- sub("_.*", "", colnames(mat_s2d)[col])
rownames(mat_s2d) <- final_names_s2d

col_fun_s2d <- colorRamp2(c(min(mat_s2d), 1, max(mat_s2d)/2, max(mat_s2d)),
                            c("white", "#c994c7", "#e7298a", "#67001f"))

draw_hm_s2d <- function() {
  ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap(mat_s2d, name = "Relative\nAbundance\n(%)",
    annotation_col = ann_col_s2d, annotation_row = ann_row_s2d,
    annotation_colors = list(Malaria = c(Yes = "red", No = "blue"), Phylum = phylum_col_s2d),
    col = col_fun_s2d,
    column_title = "D:  1 Year                                                                              \nIndividuals",
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20), row_title = "Taxa", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      at = c(min(mat_s2d), 1, max(mat_s2d)/2, max(mat_s2d)),
      labels = c(round(min(mat_s2d), 2), "1", round(max(mat_s2d)/2), round(max(mat_s2d)))))
}
draw(draw_hm_s2d())
pdf("figures/FigS2D_heatmap_1Y.pdf", width = 14, height = 8); draw(draw_hm_s2d()); dev.off()
png("figures/FigS2D_heatmap_1Y.png", width = 4200, height = 2400, res = 300); draw(draw_hm_s2d()); dev.off()
```


# Figure 6: Malaria-Induced Dysbiosis

## Figure 6A: PCoA — resistant vs before malaria

```{r fig6a, fig.cap="Beta diversity: resistant vs susceptible (before malaria)."}
set.seed(11)
ds6a <- make_clean_meco()
ds6a$sample_table <- subset(ds6a$sample_table, Type == "sample")
ds6a$sample_table <- ds6a$sample_table %>% mutate(BeforeMalaria = replace_na(BeforeMalaria, "Never"))
ds6a$sample_table <- subset(ds6a$sample_table, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))
ds6a$tidy_dataset()
ds6a$cal_betadiv(unifrac = FALSE)

t6a <- trans_beta$new(dataset = ds6a, group = "BeforeMalaria", measure = "bray")
t6a$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
p6a <- t6a$plot_ordination(plot_color = "BeforeMalaria", plot_shape = "BeforeMalaria",
                    plot_type = c("point", "ellipse"),
                    color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p6a)
save_fig(p6a, "Fig6A_PCoA_before_malaria", width = 10, height = 7)
```

## Figure 6B: PCoA — resistant vs during malaria

```{r fig6b, fig.cap="Beta diversity: resistant vs during malaria."}
set.seed(11)
ds6b <- make_clean_meco()
ds6b$cal_abund(); ds6b$cal_alphadiv(PD = FALSE); ds6b$cal_betadiv(unifrac = FALSE)
ds6b$sample_table <- subset(ds6b$sample_table, Type == "sample")
ds6b$sample_table <- ds6b$sample_table %>% mutate(DuringMalaria = replace_na(DuringMalaria, "No"))
ds6b$tidy_dataset()

t6b <- trans_beta$new(dataset = ds6b, group = "DuringMalaria", measure = "bray")
t6b$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
p6b <- t6b$plot_ordination(plot_color = "DuringMalaria", plot_shape = "DuringMalaria",
                    plot_type = c("point", "ellipse"),
                    color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p6b)
save_fig(p6b, "Fig6B_PCoA_during_malaria", width = 10, height = 7)
```

## Figure 6C: PCoA & Bray-Curtis distance — before vs post malaria

```{r fig6c, fig.cap="Beta diversity and Bray-Curtis distance: before vs post malaria."}
set.seed(11)
ds6c <- make_clean_meco()
ds6c$sample_table <- subset(ds6c$sample_table, BeforeMalaria == "Yes" | PostMalaria == "Yes")
ds6c$tidy_dataset()
ds6c$cal_abund(); ds6c$cal_alphadiv(PD = FALSE); ds6c$cal_betadiv(unifrac = FALSE)

# PCoA
t6c <- trans_beta$new(dataset = ds6c, group = "BeforeMalaria", measure = "bray")
t6c$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
p6c1 <- t6c$plot_ordination(plot_color = "BeforeMalaria", plot_shape = "BeforeMalaria",
                             plot_type = c("point", "ellipse"),
                             color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p6c1)
save_fig(p6c1, "Fig6C_PCoA_pre_post_malaria", width = 10, height = 7)

# Group distance
t6c2 <- trans_beta$new(dataset = ds6c, group = "BeforeMalaria", measure = "bray")
t6c2$cal_group_distance(within_group = TRUE)
t6c2$cal_group_distance_diff(method = "wilcox")
p6c2 <- t6c2$plot_group_distance(boxplot_add = "mean",
                                  color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
print(p6c2)
save_fig(p6c2, "Fig6C_BrayCurtis_distance", width = 8, height = 6)
```

## Figure 6D: Alpha diversity — before vs post malaria

```{r fig6d, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.cap="Alpha diversity before vs after first malaria infection."}
set.seed(11)
ds6d <- make_clean_meco()
ds6d$sample_table <- subset(ds6d$sample_table, BeforeMalaria == "Yes" | PostMalaria == "Yes")
ds6d$tidy_dataset()
ds6d$cal_abund(); ds6d$cal_alphadiv(PD = FALSE)

t6d <- trans_alpha$new(dataset = ds6d, group = "BeforeMalaria")
t6d$cal_diff(method = "KW")

for (measure in c("Chao1", "Shannon", "Simpson", "Observed")) {
  p <- t6d$plot_alpha(measure = measure, color_values = c(JulieBlue, JulieRed)) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
  print(p)
  save_fig(p, paste0("Fig6D_alpha_", measure), width = 8, height = 6)
}
```


# Supplemental Figure S1: Alpha Diversity by Timepoint

```{r figs1, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, fig.cap="Alpha diversity by malaria status at each timepoint."}
# Faithful reproduction of Figure_S1.R
set.seed(11)
ds_s1 <- make_clean_meco()
ds_s1$sample_table <- subset(ds_s1$sample_table, 
                              Time %in% c("6W", "3M", "6M", "1Y") & Type == "sample")
ds_s1$sample_table$Time <- factor(ds_s1$sample_table$Time, levels = c("6W", "3M", "6M", "1Y"))
ds_s1$sample_table <- ds_s1$sample_table %>%
  mutate(Malaria = dplyr::recode(Malaria, "No" = "Resistant", "Yes" = "Susceptible"))
ds_s1$sample_table$Malaria <- factor(ds_s1$sample_table$Malaria, 
                                      levels = c("Resistant", "Susceptible"))
ds_s1$tidy_dataset()
ds_s1$cal_abund(); ds_s1$cal_alphadiv(PD = FALSE)

t_s1 <- trans_alpha$new(dataset = ds_s1, group = "Malaria")
t_s1$cal_diff(method = "KW")

# Original .R plots only Simpson with significance annotation
p_s1 <- t_s1$plot_alpha(
  measure = "Simpson",
  plot_type = "ggboxplot",
  color_values = c(Resistant = JulieBlue, Susceptible = JulieRed),
  facet = "Time",
  add_sig = TRUE,
  add_sig_label = "Significance"
)

p_s1 <- p_s1 +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 20, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Alpha Diversity by Malaria Status at Each Timepoint",
    x = "Malaria Status",
    y = "Simpson Diversity"
  )
print(p_s1)
save_fig(p_s1, "FigS1_alpha_Simpson", width = 12, height = 6)
```




# Classifier Analysis (Figures 7, S3)

## Six-Week Model: Training and Selection

This is the verbatim code from `SixWeekModelDetermination.R`.

```{r classifier-6w, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(123)
dir.create("SixWeek", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("SixWeekResults", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Data Preparation — verbatim from SixWeekModelDetermination.R
# (readRDS replaced with pre-loaded combinedcongo)
meco_dataset <- phyloseq2meco(combinedcongo)
meco_dataset$tidy_dataset()

meco_dataset$tax_table <- base::subset(meco_dataset$tax_table, Kingdom %in% c("k__Archaea", "k__Bacteria"))
meco_dataset$filter_pollution(taxa = c("mitochondria", "chloroplast"))
st <- subset(meco_dataset$sample_table, Type == "sample")
st$BeforeMalaria <- as.character(st$BeforeMalaria)
st$BeforeMalaria[is.na(st$BeforeMalaria)] <- "Never"
st <- subset(st, BeforeMalaria %in% c("Yes", "Never"))
st <- subset(st, Time == "6W")
st$BeforeMalaria <- factor(st$BeforeMalaria, levels = c("Yes", "Never"))
meco_dataset$sample_table <- st
meco_dataset$tidy_dataset()
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 2. Determine Available Taxonomic Levels
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
get_available_taxonomic_levels <- function(meco_obj) {
  # Get all taxonomic columns from tax_table
  tax_cols <- colnames(meco_obj$tax_table)
  
  # Remove 'Taxa' column if it exists (this is typically the row identifier)
  tax_cols <- tax_cols[tax_cols != "Taxa"]
  
  # Common taxonomic level mappings
  level_mappings <- c(
    "Kingdom" = "Kingdom",
    "Phylum" = "Phylum", 
    "Class" = "Class",
    "Order" = "Order",
    "Family" = "Family",
    "Genus" = "Genus",
    "Species" = "Species"
  )
  
  # Find which levels are available
  available_levels <- c()
  for(level in names(level_mappings)) {
    if(level %in% tax_cols) {
      available_levels <- c(available_levels, level)
    }
  }
  
  # If no standard names found, use all columns except Taxa
  if(length(available_levels) == 0) {
    available_levels <- tax_cols
    cat("Warning: Using all tax_table columns as taxonomic levels\n")
  }
  
  return(available_levels)
}

# Get available taxonomic levels
taxonomic_levels <- get_available_taxonomic_levels(meco_dataset)
cat("Available taxonomic levels:\n")
cat(paste(taxonomic_levels, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 3. Robust Performance Extraction Function
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
extract_microeco_performance <- function(classifier_obj) {
  results <- list(
    accuracy = NA,
    sensitivity = NA,
    specificity = NA,
    precision = NA,
    f1_score = NA,
    balanced_accuracy = NA,
    confusion_matrix = NULL,
    success = FALSE
  )
  
  tryCatch({
    # Check multiple possible locations for confusion matrix
    cm <- NULL
    
    # Method 1: res_predict$confusionMatrix
    if(!is.null(classifier_obj$res_predict) && is.list(classifier_obj$res_predict)) {
      if("confusionMatrix" %in% names(classifier_obj$res_predict)) {
        cm <- classifier_obj$res_predict$confusionMatrix
      }
    }
    
    # Method 2: Direct access to confusionMatrix
    if(is.null(cm) && !is.null(classifier_obj$res_confusion_fit)) {
      cm <- classifier_obj$res_confusion_fit
    }
    
    # Method 3: Check res_confusion_stats
    if(is.null(cm) && !is.null(classifier_obj$res_confusion_stats)) {
      cm <- classifier_obj$res_confusion_stats
    }
    
    if(!is.null(cm)) {
      # Extract overall metrics
      if(!is.null(cm$overall) && is.vector(cm$overall)) {
        if("Accuracy" %in% names(cm$overall)) {
          results$accuracy <- as.numeric(cm$overall["Accuracy"])
        }
      }
      
      # Extract by-class metrics
      if(!is.null(cm$byClass) && is.vector(cm$byClass)) {
        metric_names <- names(cm$byClass)
        
        if("Sensitivity" %in% metric_names) {
          results$sensitivity <- as.numeric(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"])
        }
        if("Specificity" %in% metric_names) {
          results$specificity <- as.numeric(cm$byClass["Specificity"])
        }
        if("Pos Pred Value" %in% metric_names) {
          results$precision <- as.numeric(cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"])
        }
        if("F1" %in% metric_names) {
          results$f1_score <- as.numeric(cm$byClass["F1"])
        }
        if("Balanced Accuracy" %in% metric_names) {
          results$balanced_accuracy <- as.numeric(cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"])
        }
        
        # Calculate balanced accuracy if not available
        if(is.na(results$balanced_accuracy) && !is.na(results$sensitivity) && !is.na(results$specificity)) {
          results$balanced_accuracy <- (results$sensitivity + results$specificity) / 2
        }
      }
      
      results$confusion_matrix <- cm
      results$success <- TRUE
      
      cat(sprintf("  Performance extracted: Accuracy=%.3f, Sensitivity=%.3f, Specificity=%.3f\n",
                  ifelse(is.na(results$accuracy), 0, results$accuracy),
                  ifelse(is.na(results$sensitivity), 0, results$sensitivity),
                  ifelse(is.na(results$specificity), 0, results$specificity)))
    } else {
      cat("  Warning: No confusion matrix found in classifier object\n")
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  Error extracting performance: %s\n", e$message))
  })
  
  return(results)
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 4. Enhanced Single Classifier Training Function
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
train_microeco_classifier <- function(dataset, method_name, method_display_name, 
                                      taxonomic_level, with_feature_selection = TRUE, verbose = TRUE) {
  
  if(verbose) cat(sprintf("\nTraining %s (%s) at %s level%s...\n", 
                          method_display_name, method_name, taxonomic_level,
                          ifelse(with_feature_selection, " with Feature Selection", "")))
  
  result <- list(
    method_code = method_name,
    method_name = method_display_name,
    taxonomic_level = taxonomic_level,
    with_fs = with_feature_selection,
    model = NULL,
    performance = NULL,
    success = FALSE,
    error_message = NULL
  )
  
  tryCatch({
    # Create classifier
    classifier <- trans_classifier$new(
      dataset = dataset, 
      y.response = "BeforeMalaria", 
      x.predictors = taxonomic_level  # Now using the specified taxonomic level
    )
    
    # Check if we have enough features to proceed
    if(!is.null(classifier$data_feature)) {
      initial_feature_count <- ncol(classifier$data_feature)
      if(verbose) cat(sprintf("  Available features at %s level: %d\n", taxonomic_level, initial_feature_count))
      
      # Skip if too few features for meaningful analysis
      if(initial_feature_count < 2) {
        stop(sprintf("Insufficient features (%d) at %s level for classification", initial_feature_count, taxonomic_level))
      }
    }
    
    # Split data
    classifier$cal_split(prop.train = 3/4)
    
    # Feature selection if requested
    if(with_feature_selection) {
      # Check number of features available
      initial_features <- ncol(classifier$data_feature)
      if(verbose) cat(sprintf("  Initial features available: %d\n", initial_features))
      
      # Skip feature selection if too few features
      if(initial_features <= 3) {
        if(verbose) cat(sprintf("  Skipping feature selection (only %d features available)\n", initial_features))
      } else {
        classifier$cal_feature_sel(boruta.maxRuns = 200, boruta.pValue = 0.01)
        
        # Check if any features were selected
        remaining_features <- ncol(classifier$data_train)
        if(verbose) cat(sprintf("  Features after selection: %d\n", remaining_features))
        
        # If no features selected, skip this model
        if(remaining_features == 0) {
          stop("No features selected by Boruta - model cannot be trained")
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Set training control
    classifier$set_trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5, savePredictions = TRUE, classProbs = TRUE)
    
    # Train model with method-specific parameters
    if(method_name == "rf") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "rf")
    } else if(method_name == "svmRadial") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "svmRadial", tuneLength = 5)
    } else if(method_name == "svmLinear") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "svmLinear", tuneLength = 3)
    } else if(method_name == "glm") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "glm")
    } else if(method_name == "knn") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "knn", tuneGrid = expand.grid(k = c(3, 5, 7)))
    } else if(method_name == "nb") {
      classifier$cal_train(method = "nb")
    } else {
      classifier$cal_train(method = method_name)
    }
    
    # Make predictions
    classifier$cal_predict()
    
    # Calculate ROC (optional, with error handling)
    tryCatch({
      classifier$cal_ROC()
    }, error = function(e) {
      if(verbose) cat(sprintf("  Note: ROC calculation failed: %s\n", e$message))
    })
    
    # Store model
    result$model <- classifier
    
    # Extract performance
    performance <- extract_microeco_performance(classifier)
    result$performance <- performance
    result$success <- performance$success
    
    if(result$success) {
      if(verbose) cat(sprintf("[OK] %s (%s) training completed successfully\n", method_display_name, taxonomic_level))
    } else {
      if(verbose) cat(sprintf("[WARNING] %s (%s) training completed but performance extraction failed\n", method_display_name, taxonomic_level))
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    result$error_message <- e$message
    if(verbose) cat(sprintf("[FAIL] Error training %s (%s): %s\n", method_display_name, taxonomic_level, e$message))
  })
  
  return(result)
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 5. Main Analysis Pipeline
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE MULTI-TAXONOMIC MICROECO CLASSIFIER ANALYSIS ===\n")
cat("Dataset info:\n")
cat(sprintf("- Total samples: %d\n", nrow(meco_dataset$sample_table)))
cat(sprintf("- Response variable levels: %s\n", paste(levels(meco_dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria), collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("- Total features available: %d\n", nrow(meco_dataset$otu_table)))
cat(sprintf("- Taxonomic levels to analyze: %s\n", paste(taxonomic_levels, collapse = ", ")))

# Define methods to test
methods_to_test <- list(
  "rf" = "Random Forest",
  "svmRadial" = "SVM (Radial Kernel)",
  "svmLinear" = "SVM (Linear Kernel)", 
  "glm" = "Logistic Regression",
  "knn" = "k-Nearest Neighbors",
  "nb" = "Naive Bayes"
)

# Storage for all results
all_results <- list()

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 6. Run All Classifiers for All Taxonomic Levels
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== TRAINING ALL CLASSIFIERS ACROSS ALL TAXONOMIC LEVELS ===\n")

total_combinations <- length(taxonomic_levels) * length(methods_to_test) * 2  # *2 for with/without FS
current_combination <- 0

for(tax_level in taxonomic_levels) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- ANALYZING TAXONOMIC LEVEL: %s ---\n", tax_level))
  
  # Quick check of feature availability at this level
  tryCatch({
    temp_classifier <- trans_classifier$new(
      dataset = meco_dataset, 
      y.response = "BeforeMalaria", 
      x.predictors = tax_level
    )
    feature_count <- ncol(temp_classifier$data_feature)
    cat(sprintf("Features available at %s level: %d\n", tax_level, feature_count))
    
    if(feature_count < 2) {
      cat(sprintf("[WARNING] Skipping %s level - insufficient features for classification\n", tax_level))
      # Still increment counters to maintain progress tracking
      current_combination <- current_combination + (length(methods_to_test) * 2)
      next
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("[WARNING] Error checking %s level: %s\n", tax_level, e$message))
    current_combination <- current_combination + (length(methods_to_test) * 2)
    next
  })
  
  for(method_code in names(methods_to_test)) {
    method_name <- methods_to_test[[method_code]]
    
    # With feature selection
    current_combination <- current_combination + 1
    cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] ", current_combination, total_combinations))
    
    result_with_fs <- train_microeco_classifier(
      dataset = meco_dataset,
      method_name = method_code,
      method_display_name = method_name,
      taxonomic_level = tax_level,
      with_feature_selection = TRUE
    )
    all_results[[paste0(tax_level, "_", method_code, "_with_fs")]] <- result_with_fs
    
    # Without feature selection
    current_combination <- current_combination + 1
    cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] ", current_combination, total_combinations))
    
    result_without_fs <- train_microeco_classifier(
      dataset = meco_dataset,
      method_name = method_code,
      method_display_name = method_name,
      taxonomic_level = tax_level,
      with_feature_selection = FALSE
    )
    all_results[[paste0(tax_level, "_", method_code, "_without_fs")]] <- result_without_fs
    
    # Brief pause
    Sys.sleep(1)
  }
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 7. Create Comprehensive Results Summary
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== CREATING RESULTS SUMMARY ===\n")

create_results_dataframe <- function(results_list) {
  df <- data.frame(
    Taxonomic_Level = character(),
    Method = character(),
    Feature_Selection = character(),
    Success = logical(),
    Accuracy = numeric(),
    Sensitivity = numeric(),
    Specificity = numeric(),
    Precision = numeric(),
    F1_Score = numeric(),
    Balanced_Accuracy = numeric(),
    Error_Message = character(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for(result_name in names(results_list)) {
    result <- results_list[[result_name]]
    
    # Extract performance metrics
    acc <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$accuracy), 
                  result$performance$accuracy, 0)
    sens <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$sensitivity), 
                   result$performance$sensitivity, 0)
    spec <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$specificity), 
                   result$performance$specificity, 0)
    prec <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$precision), 
                   result$performance$precision, 0)
    f1 <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$f1_score), 
                 result$performance$f1_score, 0)
    bal_acc <- ifelse(!is.null(result$performance) && !is.na(result$performance$balanced_accuracy), 
                      result$performance$balanced_accuracy, 0)
    
    df <- rbind(df, data.frame(
      Taxonomic_Level = result$taxonomic_level,
      Method = result$method_name,
      Feature_Selection = ifelse(result$with_fs, "With FS", "Without FS"),
      Success = result$success,
      Accuracy = acc,
      Sensitivity = sens,
      Specificity = spec,
      Precision = prec,
      F1_Score = f1,
      Balanced_Accuracy = bal_acc,
      Error_Message = ifelse(is.null(result$error_message), "", result$error_message),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  return(df)
}

# Create summary dataframe
results_summary <- create_results_dataframe(all_results)

# Print summary by taxonomic level
cat("\n=== PERFORMANCE SUMMARY BY TAXONOMIC LEVEL ===\n")
for(tax_level in taxonomic_levels) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Level ---\n", tax_level))
  level_results <- results_summary[results_summary$Taxonomic_Level == tax_level, ]
  print(level_results[, c("Method", "Feature_Selection", "Success", "Accuracy", "Sensitivity", "Specificity", "Balanced_Accuracy")])
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 8. Identify Best Models
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== BEST MODEL IDENTIFICATION ===\n")

successful_results <- results_summary[results_summary$Success == TRUE, ]

if(nrow(successful_results) > 0) {
  # Sort by balanced accuracy
  successful_results <- successful_results[order(successful_results$Balanced_Accuracy, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  
  cat("Top 10 performing models across all taxonomic levels:\n")
  top_n <- min(10, nrow(successful_results))
  for(i in 1:top_n) {
    cat(sprintf("%d. %s - %s (%s): Balanced Accuracy = %.3f, Accuracy = %.3f\n", 
                i, 
                successful_results$Taxonomic_Level[i],
                successful_results$Method[i],
                successful_results$Feature_Selection[i],
                successful_results$Balanced_Accuracy[i],
                successful_results$Accuracy[i]))
  }
  
  # Best overall model
  best_model <- successful_results[1, ]
  cat(sprintf("\n>>> BEST OVERALL MODEL: %s - %s (%s)\n", 
              best_model$Taxonomic_Level, best_model$Method, best_model$Feature_Selection))
  cat(sprintf("   Performance: Accuracy=%.3f, Sensitivity=%.3f, Specificity=%.3f, Balanced Accuracy=%.3f\n",
              best_model$Accuracy, best_model$Sensitivity, best_model$Specificity, best_model$Balanced_Accuracy))
  
  # Best model for each taxonomic level
  cat("\n=== BEST MODEL PER TAXONOMIC LEVEL ===\n")
  for(tax_level in taxonomic_levels) {
    level_results <- successful_results[successful_results$Taxonomic_Level == tax_level, ]
    if(nrow(level_results) > 0) {
      best_for_level <- level_results[1, ]
      cat(sprintf("%s: %s (%s) - Balanced Accuracy = %.3f\n",
                  tax_level, best_for_level$Method, best_for_level$Feature_Selection, 
                  best_for_level$Balanced_Accuracy))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("%s: No successful models\n", tax_level))
    }
  }
  
} else {
  cat("[WARNING] No successful models found. Check for errors in the analysis.\n")
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 9. Generate Enhanced Visualizations
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== GENERATING VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")

if(nrow(successful_results) > 0) {
  
  # Performance comparison plot by taxonomic level
  library(reshape2)
  plot_data <- successful_results[, c("Taxonomic_Level", "Method", "Feature_Selection", "Accuracy", "Sensitivity", "Specificity", "Balanced_Accuracy")]
  melted_data <- melt(plot_data, id.vars = c("Taxonomic_Level", "Method", "Feature_Selection"))
  
  performance_plot <- ggplot(melted_data, aes(x = Method, y = value, fill = Feature_Selection)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
    facet_grid(variable ~ Taxonomic_Level, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 9)) +
    labs(title = "Classifier Performance Across All Taxonomic Levels",
         subtitle = sprintf("Analysis of %d samples with %s outcome classification", 
                            nrow(meco_dataset$sample_table),
                            paste(levels(meco_dataset$sample_table$BeforeMalaria), collapse = " vs ")),
         x = "Classification Method",
         y = "Performance Metric",
         fill = "Feature Selection") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("With FS" = "#2E86C1", "Without FS" = "#E74C3C")) +
    ylim(0, 1)
  
  ggsave("SixWeek/SixWeekmicrobiome_multi_taxonomic_performance.pdf", performance_plot, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 300)
  cat("[OK] Multi-taxonomic performance comparison plot saved to SixWeek folder\n")
  
  # Summary heatmap showing best performance per taxonomic level
  summary_for_heatmap <- successful_results %>%
    group_by(Taxonomic_Level, Method) %>%
    summarise(Best_Balanced_Accuracy = max(Balanced_Accuracy), .groups = 'drop')
  
  heatmap_plot <- ggplot(summary_for_heatmap, aes(x = Method, y = Taxonomic_Level, fill = Best_Balanced_Accuracy)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Best_Balanced_Accuracy)), color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#E74C3C", mid = "#F39C12", high = "#27AE60", 
                         midpoint = 0.6, name = "Balanced\nAccuracy") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = "Best Performance Heatmap by Taxonomic Level and Method",
         subtitle = "Values shown are best balanced accuracy (with or without feature selection)",
         x = "Classification Method",
         y = "Taxonomic Level")
  
  ggsave("SixWeek/SixWeekmicrobiome_performance_heatmap.pdf", heatmap_plot, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  cat("[OK] Performance heatmap saved to SixWeek folder\n")
  
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 10. Save All Results
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== SAVING RESULTS ===\n")

# Save summary table to SixWeek folder
write.csv(results_summary, "SixWeek/SixWeekmicrobiome_multi_taxonomic_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("[OK] Results summary saved to SixWeek folder\n")

# Save R workspace to root folder
save(all_results, results_summary, meco_dataset, successful_results, taxonomic_levels,
     file = "SixWeekmicrobiome_multi_taxonomic_analysis.RData")
cat("[OK] Complete analysis saved as RData file in root folder\n")

## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 11. Final Summary Report
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MULTI-TAXONOMIC MICROBIOME CLASSIFICATION ANALYSIS - FINAL REPORT\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat(sprintf("Dataset: Congo Malaria Microbiome Study\n"))
cat(sprintf("Target Variable: Before Malaria (Yes/Never)\n"))
cat(sprintf("Total Samples: %d\n", nrow(meco_dataset$sample_table)))
cat(sprintf("Taxonomic Levels Analyzed: %s\n", paste(taxonomic_levels, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Feature Selection: Boruta Algorithm\n"))
cat(sprintf("Cross-Validation: 5-fold CV\n\n"))

cat(sprintf("Total Models Trained: %d\n", length(all_results)))
cat(sprintf("Models per Taxonomic Level: %d (%d with FS, %d without FS)\n", 
            length(methods_to_test) * 2,
            length(methods_to_test), 
            length(methods_to_test)))

cat(sprintf("Successful Models: %d\n", nrow(successful_results)))
cat(sprintf("Failed Models: %d\n", length(all_results) - nrow(successful_results)))

if(nrow(successful_results) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("\nBest Overall Model: %s - %s (%s)\n", 
              best_model$Taxonomic_Level, best_model$Method, best_model$Feature_Selection))
  cat(sprintf("Best Model Accuracy: %.1f%%\n", best_model$Accuracy * 100))
  cat(sprintf("Best Model Balanced Accuracy: %.1f%%\n", best_model$Balanced_Accuracy * 100))
  
  # Performance interpretation
  if(best_model$Balanced_Accuracy > 0.75) {
    interpretation <- "Excellent predictive performance - strong microbiome signal for malaria history"
  } else if(best_model$Balanced_Accuracy > 0.65) {
    interpretation <- "Good predictive performance - moderate microbiome signal detected"
  } else if(best_model$Balanced_Accuracy > 0.55) {
    interpretation <- "Moderate predictive performance - weak but detectable microbiome signal"
  } else {
```
